prompt: Take this game screenshot and generate a version that looks like a frame from a black-and-white film noir movie, with dramatic shadows, high contrast, and a grainy texture.
prompt_refined: Generate an image by transforming image 1, a game screenshot, into a black-and-white film noir movie frame. The resulting image should feature dramatic, hard-edged shadows, especially cast by the central character and extending across the landscape and the lake. Apply strong high contrast, showcasing deep blacks and stark whites with minimal mid-tones. Ensure all original game UI elements are removed. A prominent, coarse film grain texture should be applied throughout the image to complete the vintage cinematic look.
objects: Black-and-white, high contrast (deep blacks, stark whites, minimal mid-tones)
Game UI elements (should not be present)
